message:
✨ Improve AI predictions and add token persistence (#547)

- Fix prediction worker to include claude-code and bob providers
- Skip offline clusters during prediction analysis (avoids timeouts)
- Update AI prompt to focus on healthy clusters only
- Add token usage persistence across agent restarts (~/.kc-agent-tokens.json)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
